allow: PowerShell(Stop-Process -Id 1262 -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; $proc = Get-Process Flatline -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($proc\) { Stop-Process -Id $proc.Id -Force }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; Remove-Item D:\\git\\Flatline\\flatline.db, D:\\git\\Flatline\\flatline.db-shm, D:\\git\\Flatline\\flatline.db-wal, D:\\git\\Flatline\\cookies.txt, D:\\git\\Flatline\\run.log -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; "cleaned")
